productDisplayName: Fila Men Navy Blue Ziggles Flip Flops
description: fila's flip flops are about understated style. This pair from fila can be worn with casual ensembles and doubles well as a beach wear. Team this with jeans and tees. Upper Striped fabric thong style straps Fabric toe separator for comfort and durability Rubber footbed with printed branding Outsole TPU outsole with branding functioning as lugs for grip and traction Slipper care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
